name: dam_combat_guard6
description: Dam spawn combat route: walk forward toward guard 6 (nearest guard in the 36-roster; becomes onscreen/target_visible) while firing the PP7. Exercises the combat oracle (shots_fired>0, projectiles>0) so the guard-AI parity divergence (FID-0054) is frame-locked to a live combat trigger. Both-sides oracle step: movement_oracle_capture.sh --route dam_combat_guard6 --native-full-trace --no-compare, then compare_combat_trace.py --align tick. Movement compare uses --align move-global (onset-rebased tick pairing; index pairing skews native per-frame vs stock per-tick 3x and manufactured a false sprint-speed divergence — DAM_PARITY_DEEP_DIVE 2026-07-17 §3.1). Known residual vs live ares: ~2 aligned ticks differ by one boost-ramp step (0.0108) from the ±1-VI-frame stock input jitter (FID-0082) shifting sprint-boost onset by one tick.
